description: §38.1 — a `<channel>` at file top level (programDepth 0) in a file that ALSO contains a `<program>` sibling fires E-CHANNEL-OUTSIDE-PROGRAM. Under v0.3, channels are app-scope shared-state vehicles that live INSIDE `<program>`; the `<program>`-but-channel-not-inside-it shape is the canonical violation (direction REVERSED from pre-v0.3 E-CHANNEL-INSIDE-PROGRAM).
rationale: §38.1: a `<channel>` positioned outside `<program>` in a file that ALSO contains a `<program>` element SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-OUTSIDE-PROGRAM. The fire is gated on `fileHasProgram === true`; move the channel to be a child of `<program>`.
